content: Adjust the default space title displayed on the Welcome Page and in the From field of the email notifications.

comment.text: The "CustomTitlesDescription" translation key is used to adjust the default space title displayed on the Welcome Page and in the From field of email notifications. It appears in a category item description section within the Portal Settings page.

usage.context:
{t("CustomTitlesWelcome")}
) : null}
{t("CustomTitlesDescription")} {welcomePageSettingsUrl ? (

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'From field' as 'حقل (الوارد)' (Inbox field) is incorrect. In the context of email notifications, 'From field' refers to the sender identity (the 'From' header), not the 'Inbox'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: قم بتعديل اسم المساحة الافتراضي المعروض في الصفحة الترحيبية وفي حقل "من" في إشعارات البريد الإلكتروني.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'From field' as 'Սկսած դաշտում' is incorrect. 'Սկսած' means 'Starting from', whereas in the context of email notifications, 'From' refers to the sender field (Ումից).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Կարգավորեք լռելյայն տարածության անվանումը, որը ցուցադրվում է Ողջույնի էջում և էլփոստի ծանուցումների «Ումից» դաշտում:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the specific location 'From field' (e-pasta nosūtītāja laukā), which is a key technical detail of where the title appears.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Pielāgojiet noklusējuma atstarpes nosaukumu, kas tiek rādīts Laipni lūdzam lapā un e-pasta paziņojumu 'No' laukā.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation 'w polu Od powiadomień e-mail' translates to 'in the From field of email notifications', which is grammatically awkward and slightly changes the meaning. It should be 'w polu Nadawca w powiadomieniach e-mail' to correctly reflect that 'From' is the name of the field.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Dostosuj domyślną nazwę obszaru wyświetlaną na stronie powitalnej i w polu Nadawca w powiadomieniach e-mail.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with "." but translation ends with "l"
The translation omits the 'From field' (From field of the email notifications) part of the instruction, only mentioning the email notifications field generally.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: පිළිගැනීමේ පිටුවේ සහ විද්‍යුත් තැපැල් දැනුම්දීම්වල 'From' ක්ෂේත්‍රයේ දිස් වන පෙරනිමි අවකාශයේ සිරැසිය වෙනස් කරන්න.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation uses 'Од пољу' (From field), which is grammatically incorrect and sounds like a literal word-for-word translation. In Serbian, 'From field' in this context should be 'пољу 'Пошљалац'' or 'пољу 'Од'' to be understandable.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Подесите подразумевани наслов простора који се приказује на страници Добродошлице и у пољу „Од“ у емаил обавештењима.
